headline: Jo Malone Responds to Estée Lauder Lawsuit, Files Defense in U.K. High Court
summary: Malone's lawyers argue the perfumer has every right to use her own name, and wonder why the Estée Lauder Cos. has filed suit now, 14 years after the founding of Jo Loves, and seven years after the first fragrance collaboration with Zara.

headline: Estee Lauder reaches $210 million settlement of lawsuit over China sales
summary: Estee Lauder has reached a $210 million settlement of a lawsuit accusing the cosmetics giant of defrauding shareholders by concealing its over dependence on improper gray-market sales in China.A...

headline: Do Wall Street Analysts Like Estée Lauder Stock?
summary: Estée Lauder has outperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
